title: Bolussen
description: Adds bolussen to the game as a craftable dutch food item
body:
![Bolus Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8c8bc49d6ed93ff5831a3f1db043ba67b1ffe91.png)
![Babbelaar recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ee52cc81febaa548e494f6a115f991fffc44971.png)
# Bolussen
This simple mod adds bolussen and zeeuwse butterscotch to the game, dutch local zeelandic snacks.

1 bolus will fill just slightly less of your hunger bar than a steak, although the saturation levels are better.

Butterscotch doesn't fill much, but it's a nice snack to have for fun.

### Language support
Multiple languages have custom names for the bolus and buttscotch
- English: Bolus
- Nederlands: Zeeuwse bolus

- English: Zeelandic butterscotch
- Nederlands: Boterbabbelaar

### Dependencies
Fabric API (only for the fabric versions)

### Future plans
If you have any suggestions, quesions or problems please let me know on twitter: @Didierman95
